AvatarRequiredTooltip: The avatar makes the contact more personal and memorable to the recipient.
ErrorDescription: Failed to share the contact. Please try again.
InvalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address.
InvalidEmailsError: One or more email addresses are invalid.

RequiredFieldTooltip: Headline is always shared so recipients have enough context.
SendCopyTooltip: You'll always receive a copy for your records.
